overview: Pirate Bowman is a Normal-class Humanoid/Human monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 60 HP, 15 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Arrow Shot at 160% ratio (240 base damage). Sight range 1100, combat radius 500.

phases.name: Ranged Attacks
phases.description: 2 ranged attacks. Arrow Shot (160%), Aboid Arrow (160%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-1500), Earth (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1100 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1100 units, loses target at 1600 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 500, ability check distance 900
strategies.description: Combat area radius 500. Ability check distance 900.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1100 units. Loses target at 1600 units.
